About

Flashcards, cloze exercises, and speech practice across multiple languages.

Type: Connected (requires internet) · Developer: FreeAppStore

Privacy

Language collects zero data. No analytics, no tracking, no cookies. Nothing leaves your browser.

Open Source

Fully open source under the MIT license. Inspect the code, report bugs, or contribute improvements.
